source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/05. Spec Sheet/A1417MCW_Specification_Rev.0.pptx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Product specification for the A1417MCW retrofit detector, including panel performance, communications, power, battery, environmental, and physical characteristics.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as DHF/DMR specification evidence for the A1417MCW retrofit detector and associated power box, battery recharger, and battery dimensions.
keyPoints: Model identified as A1417MCW Retrofit Detector.
Panel performance includes a-Si TFT sensor, CsI:TI scintillator, 2560 x 3072 total pixels, 140um pixel pitch, and 16-bit A/D conversion.
Communication is listed as Wi-Fi IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac and wired 1Giga-bit Ethernet.
Trigger modes include Line(Manual) Trigger and Auto Trigger (Auto Exposure Detection).
Power supply box input is (100-240) V~ (50/60) Hz 1.0A Class I or 24VDC 3.0A, with output 16 VDC 3.0A.
Battery performance is listed as 3 hours with full charged battery.

entities.name: Power Supply Box
entities.evidence: Power Supply Box Input (100-240) V~ (50/60) Hz 1.0A Class I or 24VDC 3.0A Output 16 VDC 3.0A

concepts.name: Panel Performance
concepts.evidence: Panel Performance Sensor Type a-Si TFT Scintillator CsI:TI Total Pixel Number 2560 x 3072 pixels

evidence.claim: The document is a product specification for model A1417MCW Retrofit Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Specification ... Models A1417MCW Retrofit Detector

evidence.claim: The A1417MCW detector uses an a-Si TFT sensor and CsI:TI scintillator.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type a-Si TFT Scintillator CsI:TI

evidence.claim: The total pixel number is 2560 x 3072 pixels.
The effective pixel number is 2466 x 3040 pixels and the effective pixel area is 345.24 x 425.6mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 2466 x 3040 pixels Effective Pixel Area 345.24 x 425.6mm

evidence.claim: The pixel pitch is 140um and limiting resolution is maximum 3.57lp/mm.
The energy range is 40 ~ 150Kv and A/D conversion is 16 bits.
Communication interfaces include Wi-Fi IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac and wired 1Giga-bit Ethernet.
Trigger modes are Line(Manual) Trigger and Auto Trigger (Auto Exposure Detection).
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger Mode Line(Manual) Trigger Auto Trigger (Auto Exposure Detection)

evidence.claim: The power supply box input is (100-240) V~ (50/60) Hz 1.0A Class I or 24VDC 3.0A, and output is 16 VDC 3.0A.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Supply Box Input (100-240) V~ (50/60) Hz 1.0A Class I or 24VDC 3.0A Output 16 VDC 3.0A

evidence.claim: Battery performance is 3 hours with full charged battery.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery Performance 3 hours (with full charged battery)

evidence.claim: Operating temperature is 10 ℃ ~ 35 ℃ and storage temperature is -15 ℃ ~ 55 ℃.
Detector dimensions are 384 x 460 x 15 mm and power box dimensions are 208 x 155 x 65 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Physical Dimension (W x D x H) Detector: 384 x 460 x 15 mm Power box: 208 x 155 x 65 mm

evidence.claim: Detector weight is 3.9 Kg or less and power box weight is 1.2 Kg.
evidence.evidenceText: Weight Detector: 3.9 Kg or less Power box: 1.2 Kg

evidence.claim: The presentation includes detector, power box, battery recharger, and battery dimension slides.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector Dimension (mm) ... Power Box Dimension (mm) ... Battery Recharger Dimension (mm) ... Battery Dimension (mm)
